title: PMS Pack of 50 21cm Square Air Fryer Sheets Disposable Paper Liner Multi Purpose Parchment Sheets Cooking Baking Roasting
features: 🍽️ Multi-Purpose Convenience: Measuring 21cm square, these paper liners are designed for versatility. 👩‍🍳 Quality Materials: Crafted from high-quality paper, these liners are food-grade and safe for cooking. The durable construction allows them to withstand a range of temperatures, providing reliable performance for various cooking methods.

🎉 Pack of 50: Each pack includes 50 square paper liners, ensuring you have an abundant supply for numerous cooking sessions. Perfect for both everyday use and entertaining guests, these liners are a practical and economical addition to your kitchen.

🚀 PMS Quality: Trust in the quality of PMS for kitchen accessories that simplify your cooking routine. The PMS Pack of 50 21cm Square Paper Air Fryer Liners is a testament to PMS's commitment to providing reliable and efficient solutions for your culinary adventures.
description: Introducing our air fryer sheets square, measuring 21 cm and available in a convenient 50-pack bundle. These perforated, non-stick liners are designed specifically to enhance your air frying experience. They not only prevent food items from sticking to the fryer basket, but also ensure even heat distribution for perfectly cooked meals every time. Made from high-quality, heat-resistant material, these liners are durable and safe to use, ensuring your food maintains its original flavor. Whether you're cooking fries, chicken, or veggies, our air fryer sheets square are an essential kitchen accessory for a hassle-free and healthier cooking experience.
